case_title: VIANEY ISLAS VS. MANUEL S. SANDAL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,302.94 FILED BY ISLAS, VIANEY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDAL, MANUEL S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($70.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED DEC-20-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANDAL, MANUEL S.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAN DEAN. FILED BY ISLAS, VIANEY SANDAL, MANUEL S.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAN DEAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---JOSE MATA. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY TAGALOGO INTERPRETER--- CHERLYN SANDAL. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAN DEAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISLAS, VIANEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANDAL, MANUEL S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
